task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome flags are enabled and disabled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://flags showing 'Experimental Web Platform features' and 'GPU rasterization' set to Enabled, and 'Smooth Scrolling' and 'Experimental QUIC protocol' set to Disabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required design asset files are downloaded to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal showing 'brand_color_palette.json', 'icon_sprite_sheet.svg', and 'typography_guide.pdf' located inside the '~/projects/design-assets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engine shortcuts are configured with the correct keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search showing entries with the shortcuts/keywords 'dribbble', 'gfonts', and 'icons'.

task_completion.description: Verify that bookmarks are organized into the specified folders with no loose bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager showing exactly two folders named 'Design Tools' and 'Inspiration', with no individual bookmark links sitting outside of these folders on the bar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the homepage and startup settings are correctly applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings showing the Homepage set to 'https://www.figma.com' and the 'On startup' option set to 'Continue where you left off'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory and 'always ask' setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Downloads showing the Location set to '/home/ga/projects/design-assets' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome is configured to not offer to save passwords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Password Manager showing the 'Offer to save passwords' toggle turned OFF.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the Chrome GUI to change settings rather than modifying preference files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through chrome://settings and chrome://flags pages.

integrity.description: Check that the agent downloaded the files using the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser navigating to http://localhost:8080 and the Chrome download UI appearing, rather than terminal commands like wget or curl.

integrity.description: Check that the agent organized bookmarks using the Chrome UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or dragging and dropping items on the bookmark bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Chrome flags: 'enable-experimental-web-platform-features' (Enabled), 'enable-gpu-rasterization' (Enabled), 'smooth-scrolling' (Disabled), 'enable-quic' (Disabled). Expected custom search engine keywords: 'dribbble', 'gfonts', 'icons'. Expected download directory: '/home/ga/projects/design-assets'.
